name: BenQ Medical Technology Corporation
summary: BenQ Medical Technology Corporation provides medical equipment, consumables, and solutions for various medical institutions and professionals worldwide. It offers operating tables, surgical lights, ultrasound systems, medical and protective masks, medical display monitors, and IQOR integrated systems. The company was formerly known as Trident Medical Corp. and changed its name to BenQ Medical Technology Corporation in June 2011. BenQ Medical Technology Corporation was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
